title: GeSS QMOF Scientific Distribution-Shift Resource

data_urls.access_notes: Use upstream paper and benchmark instructions for data links.

instructions: Start from the GeSS paper and official benchmark resources.
Select QMOF or another manageable shift setting before download.
Preserve shift labels, fidelity labels, composition, structure, and graph features.

recommended_axes.name: local_structure_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Local atomic environment, SOAP, OFM, or graph-structure similarity.

recommended_axes.name: fidelity_shift
recommended_axes.definition: Distance or category change in simulation/DFT fidelity or data-generating process.

useful_for: Testing scientific distribution shifts with physical or data-generating process axes.
Hard agent-discovery capsules where the axis is not a simple schema label.
leakage_risks: Shift labels may directly reveal the intended evaluation axis.
Composition and structure axes need careful separation from label mechanisms.
